source_label: GitHub README — aeraki-mesh/aeraki ("Aeraki [Air-rah-ki] is the Greek word for 'breeze'")
notes: Aeraki Mesh is a CNCF sandbox project that manages non-HTTP layer-7 protocols such as Dubbo, Thrift and Redis in an Istio service mesh. The maintainers spell the pronunciation out in the README: Aeraki [Air-rah-ki] is the Greek word for breeze, with the stress on the second syllable. The ae- digraph misleads English readers into air-uh-kye or ay-RAY-kee.
